sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38486" key="e)pei/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπείλ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38486.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">winding up,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐ. ποιεῖσθαι</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0559.tlg012:85:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85.2</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n38486.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rolling,</tr_> of a bandage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:12:506" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.506</biblScope> </bibl> C., al. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπείλικτο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπειλίξας</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐφελίσσω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
